rulings.Case Title: JODIE COLLINS VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 20, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Sepco Corporation¿s motion for summary judgment is denied. Plaintiff¿s declaration creates a triable issue whether any of the SEPC gaskets hew worked with contained asbestos. Defendant¿s separate statement did not identify any purported undisputed facts or otherwise make an issue of whether any asbestos was released in plaintiff¿s presence from any SEPCO gaskets. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: JODIE COLLINS VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 20, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Pneumo Abex LLC¿s motion for summary judgment is denied. Plaintiff¿s deposition testimony and declaration and Mr. LeCour¿s deposition testimony in the Hicks and Basile cases create a triable issue whether plaintiff was exposed to asbestos-containing brake products attributable to defendant. Defendant¿s objections to Mr. LeCour¿s deposition testimony are overruled. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM M. MCRAY et al VS. 3M COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 20, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Hardie-Tynes Co., Inc.¿s general demurrer to the entire complaint and special demurrers to the first, second, third, fourth and sixth causes of action are sustained with ten days leave to amend. No opposition filed. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM M. MCRAY et al VS. 3M COMPANY et al

rulings.Case Title: DAVID WEDDING et al VS. 3M COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Or Stay Action (Forum Non Conveniens)
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 20, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 3. Defendant Yarway Corporation¿s motion to dismiss or stay on the grounds of forum non conveniens is off calendar at the moving party¿s request. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID WEDDING et al VS. 3M COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder To Defendant Yarway Corporations Motion To Dismiss Or Stay (Forum Non Conveniens)
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 20, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 3. Defendant Kelly-Moore Paint Company, Inc.¿s joinder to defendant Yarway Corp.¿s motion to dismiss or stay on the grounds of forum non conveniens is off calendar. Joining defendant was dismissed on September 16. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID WEDDING et al VS. 3M COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder To Yarway Corporations Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Or Stay Action (Forum Non Conveniens)
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 20, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 3. Defendants Kaiser Gypsum Company, Inc. and Hanson Permanente Cement, Inc.¿s joinder to defendant Yarway Corp.¿s motion to dismiss or stay on the grounds of forum non conveniens is denied without prejudice to filing its own motion on forum non conveniens grounds. Defendants¿ joinder was not filed with the notice required by CCP 1005. = (220/HEK)
